decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, scheduled 2026-06-15 12:00) was stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200, title='Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run? — Mary Celeste 1872 #shorts', author=Voidline). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Catalogue now 11 Shorts, all PUBLIC, 0 SCHEDULED.

MAJOR PIPELINE STALL. (1) Routine gap: no daily-plan/pulse logged between 2026-06-13 14:02 and 2026-06-25 08:01 — ~12 days dark; automation was dormant. (2) Shorts queue fully DRY: nothing scheduled after 06-15; next 3 days (Fri 06-26 = Short day, Sat 06-27, Sun 06-28 = long-form + Short + Reddit-seed day) are all EMPTY. (3) Long-form cadence (Sundays 17:00 UTC) MISSED 06-14 and 06-21 — two Sundays with no publish. v4 Roanoke has script.json + SHORTS_PLAN.md at runs/v4-roanoke/ but NO rendered video and was last blocked on Google Flow thumb gen (UI redesign, see LEARNINGS 06-13). ACTION NEEDED before Sun 06-28: render+schedule v4 long-form, render+schedule next Shorts batch, draft Reddit r/UnresolvedMysteries seed.
